positioning: India's most recognised Vastu brand - corporate and residential consulting
description: Founded by Dr. Khushdeep Bansal, Mahavastu is the largest structured Vastu consulting firm in India. Offers both residential and corporate Vastu consultancy, a certified training academy, and has trained 25,000+ Vastu practitioners. Has a mobile app and YouTube channel with 1M+ subscribers. Consulted on corporate campuses for Infosys, Godrej, and several housing projects.
key_problem: Vastu compliance in real estate decisions is driven by informal, expensive, and unverifiable consultants. Mahavastu brings a systematic, teachable framework.
revenue_model: Consultation fees (₹5,000–₹5,00,000 depending on project size), online courses (₹15,000–₹50,000), books, app subscriptions
differentiator: Systematic 16-zone Vastu framework; largest training academy; brand recognition among builders
weakness: Primarily human-delivered (consultant bottleneck); app is tips-based not diagnostic; no property-linked data integration
notes: Most directly comparable to what KYL could add as a Vastu score layer. Mahavastu consults at the project level; KYL could automate plot-level Vastu scoring.

positioning: Vastu analyser and remedies app - compass + floor plan scanning
description: Vastu Plus is one of the top-rated Vastu apps on Google Play and App Store. Uses the phone compass to determine directions, allows users to photograph their floor plan, and provides room-by-room Vastu analysis with suggested remedies. 5M+ installs on Play Store.
key_problem: Homebuyers want to check Vastu before purchase but can't afford or access a consultant for every property they visit.
revenue_model: Freemium - basic analysis free, premium report ₹99–₹299, ad-supported
differentiator: High install base; simple UX; works offline with compass
weakness: Generic Vastu tips, not property-specific; no address/plot linkage; no professional validation
notes: Illustrates consumer demand for accessible Vastu tools. KYL could integrate a Vastu score into the land report product.

positioning: Vastu app that connects users to certified Vastu consultants
description: MyVastu provides a mobile app for basic Vastu checking (directions, room placement) combined with an on-demand marketplace to book certified Vastu experts via video call. Has partnerships with real estate developers in Gujarat and Maharashtra to offer Vastu certificates for project launches.
key_problem: Buyers want a quick, affordable Vastu check before purchasing - but can't always get an in-person consultant. MyVastu bridges self-service and expert access.
revenue_model: App subscription (₹199/month), consultant booking commission (20–30%), developer partnership fees
differentiator: App + expert marketplace hybrid; developer partnership model for project Vastu certificates
weakness: Small scale; geography-limited; consultant quality varies
notes: Most similar business model to a potential KYL Vastu sub-product: app-level scan + expert escalation.

positioning: Vastu as part of India's largest astrology platform - 50M users
description: AstroSage is India's most popular astrology app (50M+ users, Play Store 4.4★). Vastu is one of several features - users can consult Vastu experts via chat/call, get property direction analysis, and receive remedies. The Vastu feature is embedded alongside kundli, numerology, and palmistry.
key_problem: Astrology users want Vastu guidance as part of their overall life-decision support system (buy this house? start this business?).
revenue_model: Expert consultation fees (₹10–₹50/min), premium subscriptions (₹500–₹2,000/yr), astrologer platform commission
differentiator: Massive existing user base; trust built via astrology; on-demand expert access at very low price point (₹10/min)
weakness: Vastu is a minor feature, not a core product; no property-address integration; expert quality inconsistent
notes: Shows that Vastu demand is embedded in everyday consumer decision-making in India. Not a direct product competitor.

positioning: India's first online Vastu consultant marketplace
description: Vastukar.com is a directory and booking platform for Vastu Shastra experts across India. Users can filter by city, expertise (residential/commercial), and budget. Consultants get verified profiles and receive leads. Over 500 listed experts across 50+ cities.
key_problem: Finding a credible, verified Vastu consultant is hard - the market is full of unverified practitioners with no accountability.
revenue_model: Lead generation fee from consultants (₹500–₹2,000 per lead), profile listing subscription
differentiator: First mover in Vastu consultant marketplace; verified expert profiles
weakness: Low tech; no app; no standardised Vastu methodology; marketplace economics thin
notes: Early but underdeveloped. Fragmented consultant market is the problem KYL could solve with a standardised Vastu score.

positioning: Scientific Vastu consulting brand - residential, commercial, and industrial
description: Planet Vastu by Dr. Dhara Bhatt approaches Vastu through a scientific and architectural lens - mapping Vastu principles to civil engineering and construction. Consults on new home constructions, builder projects, and factories. Active YouTube presence (500K+ subscribers) and has trained 10,000+ practitioners.
key_problem: Traditional Vastu is seen as superstitious. Planet Vastu bridges Vastu and architectural science to attract a modern, educated audience.
revenue_model: Consultation fees (₹2,000–₹2,00,000), online courses, YouTube ad revenue, books
differentiator: Scientific/architectural angle resonates with builders and educated buyers; strong content brand
weakness: Small scale; human-delivered; app is basic; limited to personal consulting bandwidth
notes: Represents the 'scientific Vastu' positioning that could be a credible adjacent partner for KYL's land report.

positioning: Generic Vastu tips and direction apps - high install, low depth
description: There are 50+ Vastu Shastra apps on the Google Play Store and Apple App Store with 1M–10M installs each. These include 'Vastu Shastra in Hindi', 'Vastu Tips', 'Vastu Dosh Nivaran', 'Vastu for Home', etc. Mostly static content apps providing general tips, no address-linked analysis.
key_problem: Mass-market consumers want basic Vastu knowledge in Hindi/regional languages but cannot access or afford consultants.
revenue_model: Ad-supported (free). Some with ₹99–₹199 in-app purchase to remove ads or unlock premium tips.
differentiator: Hindi and regional language content; offline access; zero price point
weakness: No property-specific analysis; no professional backing; generic and inconsistent advice
notes: Shows massive unmet demand for accessible Vastu guidance. None of these integrate with property addresses, records, or professional validation - clear white space.

positioning: Research-based Vastu institute - policy, academia, and high-value consulting
description: Vaastu International is one of India's oldest Vastu research institutions, with connections to IIT and Delhi University for architectural research. Focuses on high-value residential and commercial projects (hospitals, hotels, IT parks). Consults for government buildings and embassies.
key_problem: There is no academic or research-based validation of Vastu principles. Vaastu International attempts to bridge traditional knowledge and modern architecture.
revenue_model: Project consulting fees (₹50,000–₹10,00,000+), research publications, workshops
differentiator: Academic credibility + institutional client base (embassies, hospitals, government buildings)
weakness: Very niche; extremely small scale; no product; no tech component
notes: Represents the premium-institutional end of Vastu market. KYL land report could include a Vastu certificate from such empanelled experts.

positioning: Global Feng Shui and space clearing consultant brand - nearest Western analogue to Vastu
description: Karen Kingston's Clear Space is the most recognised Western Feng Shui consulting and book brand globally. Her book 'Clear Your Clutter with Feng Shui' has sold 2M+ copies. Offers online consultations and courses. Feng Shui is the Chinese spatial harmony system analogous to Indian Vastu Shastra.
key_problem: People in Western markets want to optimise their living and working spaces for energy, wellbeing, and prosperity - paralleling the Vastu need in India.
revenue_model: Consulting fees, book royalties, online courses
differentiator: 2M+ book sales; globally recognised brand in Feng Shui
weakness: No tech product; aging brand; very small team; no India presence
notes: Global analogue shows that spatial harmony consulting has demand outside India too. No tech platform in either Vastu or Feng Shui globally - white space.

positioning: Vastu direction and room placement checker app
description: iVastu is a mobile app for checking Vastu compliance of a home using the phone's compass. Users enter their home's facing direction and get room-by-room Vastu scores, colour suggestions, and remedies. Available on both Play Store and App Store.
key_problem: Quick, self-serve Vastu check without needing to call a consultant.
revenue_model: Free with ads. Premium version ₹149 (one-time) to remove ads.
differentiator: Simple UI; bilingual (Hindi + English); works offline
weakness: No property address linkage; no professional backing; generic output
notes: Generic compass app. No integration with land records or property data.

positioning: Vastu education brand - 2M+ YouTube subscribers, online courses, NRI focus
description: Started as a YouTube channel by Acharya Chetnanand, Vastu Devayah Namah has grown to 2M+ subscribers making it India's largest Vastu YouTube channel. Offers paid online Vastu consultations (₹2,000–₹25,000), certification courses, and live workshops. Strong NRI client base (US, Canada, UK, Australia).
key_problem: NRI buyers purchasing property in India can't get in-person Vastu consultancy - remote/video consultation is needed.
revenue_model: YouTube ad revenue, online consultation fees (₹2,000–₹25,000), certification courses (₹8,000–₹35,000)
differentiator: Largest Vastu YouTube audience; strong NRI trust; remote-first model
weakness: No product or app; single-person brand dependency; no property-data integration
notes: NRI angle is significant - NRIs buying Indian land are KYL's highest-value target users AND Vastu-conscious. Both audiences overlap.
